---
title: "Week 6: Reports, data visualization, and models"
author: "Andrew Heiss"
date: "2026-03-10"
---

## All sorts of links!

- [Course on data visualization with ggplot](https://datavizsp26.classes.andrewheiss.com/) + [other example class websites](https://www.andrewheiss.com/teaching/) and teaching materials
- [Quarto used in production for US state-level election results reporting](https://andrewheiss.github.io/election-desk/posit-conf-2025.html)
- [Research notebook](https://stats.andrewheiss.com/silent-skywalk/) + [article manuscript](https://stats.andrewheiss.com/silent-skywalk/notebook/manuscript.html) with Quarto
- [{clinify}](https://atorus-research.github.io/clinify/) for making clinical reporting tables
- The [pharmaverse](https://pharmaverse.org/) collection of packages
- [Adding SAS chunks to Quarto documents](https://docs.ropensci.org/sasquatch/)
